reviews.comment:
Tengan cuidado el encargado y el dueño son unos maleducados.yo llene el tanque de nafta y me quede descansando unos minutos en el parquesito de al lado con mi pareja y nos echaron como si fuéramos delincuentes. Nunca más vuelvo ,la verdad una vergüenza que no tengan gente capacitada para tratar con los cliente.

(Translated by Google)
Beware, the manager and the owner are incredibly rude. I filled up my gas tank and rested for a few minutes in the small park next door with my partner, and they kicked us out like we were criminals. I'll never go back. It's a disgrace that they don't have staff trained to deal with customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBXzdDVG1RRRAB
